zh.lifeSummary: Baroness Margaret Deincourt是Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt和Isabel De Mohun的女兒，於大約1277年出生在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼。她於1303年與Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby在英國林可爾史爾維洛賀比結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1333年10月18日之前在英國林可爾史爾維洛賀比，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Baroness Margaret Deincourt was born about 1277, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England as the daughter of Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt and Isabel De Mohun. She married Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby in 1303, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 18 October 1333, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, and was buried in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

fr.lifeSummary: Baroness Margaret Deincourt est née environ 1277, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, fille de Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt et Isabel De Mohun. Elle a épousé Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby en 1303, à Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 18 octobre 1333, à Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

Lei sposato Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby nel 1303, nel Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 18 ottobre 1333, nel Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, e fu sepolta a Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Margaret Deincourtは約1277年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーでSir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of EyncourtとIsabel De Mohunの娘として生まれた。1303年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウィロウビーでLord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1333年10月18日以前にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウィロウビーで死去し，パキスタンآزاد جموں و کشمیرブリaルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Margaret Deincourt(은)는 대략 1277년 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt(와)과 Isabel De Mohun의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1303년 영국 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1333년 10월 18일 이전 영국 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 사망했으며 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Baroness Margaret Deincourt nasceu aproximadamente 1277, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra filha de Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt e Isabel De Mohun. Ela casou-se com Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby em 1303, em Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 18 de outubro de 1333, em Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Paquistão.

ru.Burial Details Unknown: буриaл, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан
ru.lifeSummary: Baroness Margaret Deincourt родилась около 1277 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt и Isabel De Mohun. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby в 1303 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 18 октябрь 1333 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия и была похоронена в местности буриaл, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан.

es.lifeSummary: Baroness Margaret Deincourt nació aproximadamente 1277, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra como hija de Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt y Isabel De Mohun. Se casó con Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby en 1303, en Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 18 de octubre de 1333, en Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistán.
